ddls:
CREATE TABLE "performances" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student associated with the performance */,
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* ID of the trial associated with the performance */,
  "note_nr" INTEGER /* Note number in the performance */,
  "time_stamp" INTEGER /* Time stamp of the performance */,
  "pitch" INTEGER /* Pitch of the performance */,
  "velocity" INTEGER /* Velocity of the performance */,
  "key_on_off" INTEGER /* Key on/off status */,
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the device used */,
  "tempo" INTEGER /* Tempo of the performance */,
  "sub_nr" INTEGER /* Sub number of the performance */,
  "block_nr" INTEGER /* Block number of the performance */,
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* ID of the skill demonstrated */,
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* ID of the condition of the performance */,
  "error_count" INTEGER /* Number of errors in the performance */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the performance (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback on the performance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_condition_id FOREIGN KEY ("condition_id") REFERENCES conditions ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_device_id FOREIGN KEY ("device_id") REFERENCES devices ("device_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performances_skill_id FOREIGN KEY ("skill_id") REFERENCES skills ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "devices" (
  "device_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each device */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the device */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model number of the device */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the device */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the device */,
  "device_name" TEXT /* Name of the device */,
  "device_type" TEXT /* Type of device (e.g., piano, guitar) */,
  "device_settings" TEXT /* Settings for the device (e.g., MIDI, audio) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("device_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "skills" (
  "skill_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each skill */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the skill (e.g., technical, musical) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the skill (e.g., dynamics, articulation) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the skill */,
  "skill_name" TEXT /* Name of the skill */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("skill_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each condition */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the condition (e.g., performing, practicing) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the condition (e.g., audition, rehearsal) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the condition */,
  "condition_name" TEXT /* Name of the condition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "images" (
  "image_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each image */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance associated with the image */,
  "image_category" TEXT /* Category of the image (e.g., score, waveform) */,
  "image_format" TEXT /* Format of the image (e.g., PNG, JPEG) */,
  "image_file" TEXT /* File path to the image */,
  "image_type" TEXT /* Type of image (e.g., score, waveform) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("image_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_images_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "trials" (
  "trial_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each trial */,
  "student_id" INTEGER /* ID of the student associated with the trial */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance associated with the trial */,
  "trial_nr" INTEGER /* Number of the trial */,
  "trial_type" TEXT /* Type of trial (e.g., practice, performance) */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the trial */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the trial */,
  "trial_date" TEXT /* Date of the trial */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("trial_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_trials_student_id FOREIGN KEY ("student_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role associated with the user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user (hashed) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., instructor, student) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "errors" (
  "error_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each error */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance associated with the error */,
  "error_category" TEXT /* Category of the error (e.g., pitch, rhythm) */,
  "error_sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the error (e.g., pitch: sharp, flat) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the error */,
  "error_type" TEXT /* Type of error (e.g., pitch, rhythm) */,
  "error_description" TEXT /* Description of the error */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the error occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("error_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_errors_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* ID of the performance being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the performance */,
  "access_category" TEXT /* Category of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the performance */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent of the user accessing the performance */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the performance was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_performance_id FOREIGN KEY ("performance_id") REFERENCES performances ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
